creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174152
ums.diff

This issue still exists 4 years later.  Tomek's "fix" works for me too.  I'm attaching a diff to make it easier to apply.

In case it matters, my usbconfig -d 0.2 do_request 0x81 0x06 0x2200 1 0x100 output is identical as Tomek's.
